level_signals: Role described as a 'proven stepping stone into Account Executive and other closing roles'
Accepts candidates with academic, internship, or limited work experience
Base pay range $23.08–$34.62/hr consistent with entry-level individual contributor
6 months+ business development experience listed as a plus, not required

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have previous academic, work and/or internship experience with some transferable skills (sales, customer service, support, retail, hospitality, etc.)
Excited, motivated, and inspired by exceeding goals and continuously learning
Thoughtful, engaging, energetic, and a self-initiator
Experience or the ability to operate in a fast-paced, high-volume environment
Detail-oriented with strong time management and prioritization skills
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
Excellent interpersonal and customer service skills; you enjoy talking to customers and helping them make decisions
Proficient with Google Suite and Microsoft Office Suite or related software

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 6 months+ experience in business development is a plus, but not required
CRM proficiency (Salesforce or similar) is a plus

scope.surface: Inbound demand (demos, trials, free accounts, product inquiries) for smallest/SMB accounts; sits within Marketing under the Growth motion
scope.business_model: SaaS / PLG — free-to-paid conversion, ecommerce email and SMS marketing platform
core_responsibilities: Field inbound demand (demos, trials, free accounts, and product inquiries) via phone, email, and other channels
Run consultative, decision-driven demos focused on one-call closes whenever possible for smaller opportunities
Do targeted business discovery to understand goals, urgency, and fit
Qualify in or out efficiently, so you know where to double-down and where to quickly move on
Own and work a high-velocity pipeline, using strong prioritization and time management to maximize new logo acquisition
Consult with customers to advise and design solutions based on ecommerce best practices and optimal utilization of Klaviyo's platform
Collaborate cross-functionally to improve overall customer experience and create structured feedback loops

compensation.equity_form: equity mentioned as part of total compensation package alongside annual cash bonus and OTE variable compensation

green_flags: Role described as a clear career stepping stone into AE and GTM roles
Cross-functional exposure to Sales, CS, Marketing, and Product
Well-defined primary objective (new logo acquisition) and supporting metrics
red_flags: Location/work arrangement not specified — fully unclear whether remote, hybrid, or onsite
Role involves high-volume inbound work which may limit strategic depth for candidates seeking complex deal cycles
Travel requirement (up to 10%) not always expected for an entry-level inbound role — worth clarifying scope
Use of AI-based hiring tool (Covey) disclosed; NYC applicants flagged as AEDT — may concern some candidates

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from pay range, stepping-stone language, and experience requirements)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and free-to-paid conversion metric)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not all explicitly listed as metrics in JD)
location.type set to 'unclear' — JD mentions US locations and travel but does not specify office policy
compensation.base_range_usd stored as hourly figures as stated; annualized equivalents not computed
ambiguities: Location/work arrangement is never specified in the JD body (remote, hybrid, or onsite); cities_listed left empty as no specific city is tied to this role
